morningBrief.headline: Weather Advisory: Rain
morningBrief.body: Zero new inches, but who's complaining? 12" this week means conditions are still prime. Nearly full mountain access with 110 of 113 trails spinning. Lift lines were mellow yesterday. Expect a similar vibe today.
